added_paragraphs: TikTok is not directed at children under the age of 16. If you believe that there is a user who is below this minimum age, please contact us at https://www.tiktok.com/legal/report/privacy.

You may raise complaints, exercise your rights or seek any remedies by contacting us at https://www.tiktok.com/legal/report/privacy. If you disagree with our response, you also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Office of the Australian Information Commissioner (OAIC) at:
llm_summary: TikTok's updated privacy policy now explicitly states that the platform is not directed at children under the age of 16 and provides a contact link for reporting users who may be under this age. Additionally, users are informed that they can raise complaints or seek remedies through a specified link, and they have the right to lodge a complaint with the Office of the Australian Information Commissioner if they disagree with TikTok's response. No other changes were made to the policy.
